data.content: Codex approvals review/test follow-up complete. Root cause for failed Codex harness was twofold: Codex prompt-mode settings were not preserved when selecting agents from dispatch pools, and prompt-mode Codex app-server/JSON-RPC sessions did not force untrusted/read-only approval settings end to end. Commit a84527b3 pushed to origin/main and codex/foolery-a7a1-no-oneshot-take. Live Codex harness passed for codex-gpt-5-4-mini with safe python3 trigger: approval request surfaced in terminal SSE, first request approved through Foolery UI, and agent continued after approval. Full verification passed: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false; bun run test; bun run build; git diff --check.
